text:
ATRIP 令牌

在指南和链接中使用 ATRIP 令牌 作为主要名称。

此 API 映射到 getAtripToken.do。

旧版资料可能称之为 getAtripToken。

getAtripToken

\*Dependency\*
No preceding function needs to be carried out.

Dependency
No preceding function needs to be carried out.

请求头参数：
Accept (header, required=True): 
Content-Type (header, required=True): 
Accept-Encoding (header, required=True): 
x-atlas-client-id (header, required=True): 
x-atlas-client-secret (header, required=True):

fields.name: orderNo
fields.description: Order number. It can be an order for ticketing, or an order for add bags. The format of each kind of order is different.

fields.name: userName
fields.description: This is to identifier the operator's name in client's system, Atlas will grant access to this operator and track his/her actions in Atlas customer service portal.

fields.name: role
fields.description:
This is to identify the operator's role. Atlas will grant access to this operator according to the role assigned. Here are the acceptable options:

Customer service : Access to manage orders and request post ticketing services

Finance : Access to manage the balance and check statements

Developer : Access to manage the system configurations

Admin : Full access

text:
请求体字段：
- orderNo (string，必填): Order number. It can be an order for ticketing, or an order for add bags. The format of each kind of order is different.
- userName (string，必填): This is to identifier the operator's name in client's system, Atlas will grant access to this operator and track his/her actions in Atlas customer service portal.
- role (string，必填): This is to identify the operator's role. Atlas will grant access to this operator according to the role assigned. Here are the acceptable options:

Customer service : Access to manage orders and request post ticketing services

Finance : Access to manage the balance and check statements

Developer : Access to manage the system configurations

Admin : Full access

fields.name: url
fields.description: A url with token to access to Atlas customer service portal.

text:
响应字段 url：
- url (string，可选): A url with token to access to Atlas customer service portal.

fields.name: status
fields.description:
0: success

2: System error

3: unauthorized access

text:
响应字段 status：
- status (integer，可选): 0: success

2: System error

3: unauthorized access

fields.name: msg
fields.description:
Error message.

The 'msg' element is for description of the results. Please DO NOT use this field to check the success or failure of the request. Only use the 'status' code to check the result.

text:
响应字段 msg：
- msg (string，可选): Error message.

The 'msg' element is for description of the results. Please DO NOT use this field to check the success or failure of the request. Only use the 'status' code to check the result.

余额

Get Balance

\*Dependency\*
No preceding function needs to be carried out.

\*Endpoint:\*
https://sandbox.atriptech.com/balance.do

Dependency
No preceding function needs to be carried out.

Endpoint:
https://sandbox.atriptech.com/balance.do

请求头参数：
Accept (header, required=True): 
Content-Type (header, required=True): 
Accept-Encoding (header, required=True): 
x-atlas-client-id (header, required=True): 
x-atlas-client-secret (header, required=True):

fields.name: currency
fields.description: The currency of your balance account

text:
请求体字段：
- currency (string，必填): The currency of your balance account

响应字段 status：
- status (integer，可选):

响应字段 msg：
- msg (string，可选):

fields.name: accountBalance
fields.description: This element contavins the information regarding the amount and the currency of transaction of the customer.

fields.name: accountBalance.amount
fields.description: The amount of balance in your deposit account.

fields.name: accountBalance.currency
fields.description: The currency in which Atlas settles transactions with you.

text:
响应字段 accountBalance：
- accountBalance (object，可选): This element contavins the information regarding the amount and the currency of transaction of the customer.
- accountBalance.amount (string，必填): The amount of balance in your deposit account.
- accountBalance.currency (string，必填): The currency in which Atlas settles transactions with you.

航线导出

在指南和链接中使用 航线导出 作为主要名称。

此 API 映射到 route/export.do。

旧版资料可能称之为 城市对 API。

City Pairs API

The "City pairs API" can be used to download the city pairs supported by Atlas as well as by the airlines. 
The customer can use this structured data and transfer the city pair information into their mid-back office systems.

\*This API is only available in the production environment.\*

\*Dependency\*
There is no dependency for this call.

\*Endpoint:\*
https://sandbox.atriptech.com/route/export.do

The "City pairs API" can be used to download the city pairs supported by Atlas as well as by the airlines. 
The customer can use this structured data and transfer the city pair information into their mid-back office systems.

This API is only available in the production environment.

Dependency
There is no dependency for this call.

Endpoint:
https://sandbox.atriptech.com/route/export.do

请求头参数：
Accept (header, required=True): 
Content-Type (header, required=True): 
Accept-Encoding (header, required=True): 
x-atlas-client-id (header, required=False): 
x-atlas-client-secret (header, required=False):

fields.name: routeType
fields.description:
-1: Airline routes
-2: Atlas routes

fields.name: fromCity
fields.description: IATA Code of departure city.

fields.name: fromCountry
fields.description: IATA Code of departure country.

fields.name: toCity
fields.description: IATA Code of arrival city or airport

fields.name: toCountry
fields.description: IATA Code of arrival country.

fields.name: airlines
fields.description: An array of IATA Codes of airlines. The routes within the airlines will be returned.

text:
请求体字段：
- routeType (integer，必填): -1: Airline routes
-2: Atlas routes
- fromCity (string，可选): IATA Code of departure city.
- fromCountry (string，可选): IATA Code of departure country.
- toCity (string，可选): IATA Code of arrival city or airport
- toCountry (string，可选): IATA Code of arrival country.
- airlines (array<string>，可选): An array of IATA Codes of airlines. The routes within the airlines will be returned.
- pageSize (integer，可选): 
- pageNumber (integer，可选):

响应字段 status：
- status (integer，可选):

响应字段 msg：
- msg (string，可选):

fields.name: data[].airlines
fields.description: An array of IATA Codes of airlines.

fields.name: data[].fromCity
fields.description: IATA Code of departure city or airport

fields.name: data[].fromCountry
fields.description: IATA Code of departure country.

fields.name: data[].toCity
fields.description: IATA Code of arrival city or airport

fields.name: data[].toCountry
fields.description: IATA Code of arrival country.

fields.name: data[].isDirect
fields.description:
-true: Direct Flight
-false: Connecting Flight
This data will only be available when the "routeType" = 2 (Atlas Routes)

fields.name: data[].scheduleStart
fields.description: The start date of the booking window. The format is YYYYMMDD.

fields.name: data[].scheduleEnd
fields.description: The end date of the booking window. The format is YYYYMMDD.

fields.name: data[].updateDate
fields.description: The date when the routing data was updated. The format is YYYYMMDD.

text:
响应字段 data：
- data (array<object>，可选)（还有 9 个嵌套子字段，完整字段名/类型/含义见该 chunk 的 fields 元数据，不在此列出）

邮件查询

在指南和链接中使用 邮件查询 作为主要名称。

此 API 映射到 queryMail.do。

旧版资料可能称之为 邮件列表。

Email List

\*Dependency\*
No preceding function needs to be carried out.

\*Endpoint:\*
https://sandbox.atriptech.com/queryMail.do

Dependency
No preceding function needs to be carried out.

Endpoint:
https://sandbox.atriptech.com/queryMail.do

请求头参数：
Accept (header, required=True): 
Content-Type (header, required=True): 
Accept-Encoding (header, required=True): 
x-atlas-client-id (header, required=True): 
x-atlas-client-secret (header, required=True):

fields.name: orderNo
fields.description:
Order number.
At least one of the order number, receiving time and/or creation time must be specified for querying.

fields.name: emailReceivingDateStart
fields.description:
Start of the receiving time.
The time Atlas received the airline's email.
Format: yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm:ss UTC+08:00

fields.name: emailReceivingDateEnd
fields.description:
End of the receiving time.
The time Atlas received the airline's email.
Format: yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss UTC+08:00.
You can only query data for up to one month at a time

fields.name: createTimeStart
fields.description:
Start of creation time.
Create Time is the time when Atlas created this email record in the Email list. Generally, it will be later than the receiving time.
Format: yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss UTC+08:00

fields.name: createTimeEnd
fields.description:
End of creation time.
Create Time is the time when Atlas created this email record in the Email list. Generally, it will be later than the receiving time.
Format: yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm:ss UTC+08:00
You can only query data for up to one month at a time.

fields.name: emailCategories
fields.description:
Atlas email categories. Atlas categorizes emails but does not guarantee accuracy in classification.
-Travel Itinerary
-Schedule Change
-Payment Due
-Payment Success
-Receipt
-Trip Reminder
-PNR Cancellation Success
-Advertisement
-Duplicated Schedule Change
-Verification
-Unaccounted Cancellation
-Promo code

text:
请求体字段：
- orderNo (string，可选): Order number.
At least one of the order number, receiving time and/or creation time must be specified for querying.
- emailReceivingDateStart (string，可选): Start of the receiving time.
The time Atlas received the airline's email.
Format: yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm:ss UTC+08:00
- emailReceivingDateEnd (string，可选): End of the receiving time.
The time Atlas received the airline's email.
Format: yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss UTC+08:00.
You can only query data for up to one month at a time
- createTimeStart (string，可选): Start of creation time.
Create Time is the time when Atlas created this email record in the Email list. Generally, it will be later than the receiving time.
Format: yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss UTC+08:00
- createTimeEnd (string，可选): End of creation time.
Create Time is the time when Atlas created this email record in the Email list. Generally, it will be later than the receiving time.
Format: yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm:ss UTC+08:00
You can only query data for up to one month at a time.
- emailCategories (string，可选): Atlas email categories. Atlas categorizes emails but does not guarantee accuracy in classification.
-Travel Itinerary
-Schedule Change
-Payment Due
-Payment Success
-Receipt
-Trip Reminder
-PNR Cancellation Success
-Advertisement
-Duplicated Schedule Change
-Verification
-Unaccounted Cancellation
-Promo code
- pageIndex (string，可选): 
- pageSize (string，可选):

响应字段 status：
- status (integer，可选):

响应字段 msg：
- msg (string，可选):

fields.name: hasNext
fields.description:
-true: There is also the next page
-false: There is not the next page

text:
响应字段 hasNext：
- hasNext (boolean，可选): -true: There is also the next page
-false: There is not the next page

fields.name: records[].orderNo
fields.description: Order number

fields.name: records[].emailReceivingDate
fields.description:
The time Atlas received the airline's email.
Format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss UTC+08:00

fields.name: records[].uniqueCode
fields.description: Unique Code of the email

fields.name: records[].emailCategory
fields.description: Atlas email categories. Atlas categorizes emails but does not guarantee accuracy in classification.

fields.name: records[].from
fields.description: Email “from” address

fields.name: records[].to
fields.description: Email “to” address

fields.name: records[].emailSubject
fields.description: Email “Subject”

fields.name: records[].emailLink
fields.description: Email Link. Email Link is only valid for 10 mins.

fields.name: records[].createTime
fields.description:
Create Time is the time when Atlas created this email record in the Email list.
Generally, it will be later than the receiving time.
Format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss UTC+08:00

text:
响应字段 records：
- records (array<object>，可选)（还有 9 个嵌套子字段，完整字段名/类型/含义见该 chunk 的 fields 元数据，不在此列出）
